---
title: "Review and export"
---

This section covers the work that usually happens after coding: checking consistency, comparing coders, and exporting project data for analysis or archiving.

## Pages in this section

- [Agreement](user-guide/agreement.qmd)
- [Export data](user-guide/export.qmd)

## Suggested order

Use agreement summaries to identify codes that need discussion or clarification. Export annotations, notes, codebooks, or agreement data once the project is ready for analysis outside ACE.
